# Archive test fixtures

`basic.7z` and `encrypted.7z` are copied from
[`github.com/bodgit/sevenzip`](https://github.com/bodgit/sevenzip) v1.6.1:

- `basic.7z` is upstream `testdata/t0.7z`.
- `encrypted.7z` is upstream `testdata/t4.7z` and uses the password `password`.

They are redistributed under the upstream BSD 3-Clause license:

`libarchive/test/test_read_format_rar5_stored.rar.uu` fixture. It is
redistributed under libarchive's BSD 2-Clause license:
